items.headline: टी-20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026: न्यूज़ीलैंड ने अफ़ग़ानिस्तान को 5 विकेट से हराया
whyItMatters: इमेज स्रोत, Nikhil Patil/Getty Images टी-20 वर्ल्ड कप के पांचवें मैच में इंग्लैंड और नेपाल आमने-सामने हैं. इंग्लैंड ने पहले बल्लेबाज़ी करते हुए नेपाल को 185 रन का टारगेट दिया है. इंग्लैंड ने 7 विकट खो
summaryParagraphs: इमेज स्रोत, Nikhil Patil/Getty Images टी-20 वर्ल्ड कप के पांचवें मैच में इंग्लैंड और नेपाल आमने-सामने हैं. इंग्लैंड ने पहले बल्लेबाज़ी करते हुए नेपाल को 185 रन का टारगेट दिया है. इंग्लैंड ने 7 विकट खोकर 184 रन बनाए थे. मुंबई के वानखेड़े स्टेडियम में चल रहे मुक़ाबले में इंग्लैंड ने टॉस जीतकर पहले बल्लेबाज़ी करने का फ़ैसला किया. इस टूर्नामेंट में दोनों टीमों का यह पहला मुक़ाबला है. इंग्लैंड को पहला झटका दूसरे ओवर की पहली गेंद पर ही लग गया था, जब फ़िलिप सॉल्ट महज़ 1 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए थे. उन्हें शेर मल्ला की गेंद पर संदीप लामिछाने ने कैच आउट किया था. इस मैच की दोनों टीमें इस तरह हैं- इंग्लैंड प्लेइंग इलेवन: फ़िलिप सॉल्ट, जोस बटलर (विकेट कीपर), जैकब बेथेल, टॉम बैंटन, हैरी ब्रूक (कप्तान), सैम करन, विल जैक्स, लियाम डॉसन, जोफ़्रा आर्चर, आदिल राशिद, ल्यूक वुड नेपाल प्लेइंग इलेवन: कुशाल भुर्टेल, आसिफ़ शेख (विकेट कीपर), रोहित पौडेल (कप्तान), दीपेंद्र सिंह ऐरी, आरिफ़ शेख, लोकेश बाम, गुलशन झा, करण केसी, नंदन यादव, संदीप लामिछाने, शेर मल्ला For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Mumbai stamp duty revenue hits 14-year January high despite dip in registrations
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Mumbai recorded stamp duty collections of over
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Mumbai recorded stamp duty collections of over ₹1,012 crore in January 2026, the highest for the month in 14 years, despite an 8 per cent year-on-year decline in property registrations to 11,219 units, according to Knight Frank India. The 2 per cent growth in stamp duty revenue reflects a shift toward higher-value transactions, with homes priced above ₹5 crore accounting for 7 per cent of total registrations, up from 6 per cent in January 2025. Properties in the ₹1-2 crore bracket also saw increased share, rising from 30 per cent to 33 per cent year-on-year. Residential properties dominated the market, comprising nearly 80 per cent of registrations. Western and Central Suburbs together accounted for 87 per cent of total activity, with the Western Suburbs leading at 57 per cent. Compact units up to 1,000 square feet continued to domina For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Stalin flags fund delays by Centre, urges PM to revive stalled railway projects
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin | Photo Cr
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin | Photo Credit: ASHOK R Tamil Nadu Chief Minister MK Stalin has urged Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s intervention for timely resolution of pending issues on railway projects in the state, particularly regarding the release of funds for land acquisition and the revival of projects that have been placed in abeyance. “I am constrained to write this in the light of some factually incorrect information that are being spread in the media in this regard,” he said. Stalin in the letter said that in Tamil Nadu, Administrative Sanction have been accorded for acquisition of Lands to an extent of 2500.61.06 Hectares for implementation of various Railway Projects of the Union Government. Out of 2500.61.06 Hectares of Lands, Railways have not sanctioned funds for an extent of 931.52.96 Hectares of Lands. Administ For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: India's housing market strong, steady after crazy post-Covid growth: Pirojsha Godrej
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Pirojsha Godrej, Executive Chairperson, Godrej
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Pirojsha Godrej, Executive Chairperson, Godrej Properties | Photo Credit: SHASHI ASHIWAL India's housing market continues to be strong with steady growth in sales volume as well as pricing, Godrej Properties Executive Chairperson Pirojsha Godrej said, ruling out any concern on the demand side. In an interview with PTI, he noted that the housing market has stabilised after witnessing a crazy growth for a couple of years post-COVID pandemic. Pirojsha exuded confidence that the company would easily achieve its ₹32,500 crore target of sales bookings for this fiscal. The company would also meet the annual guidance in other key metrics -- collection of funds from customers, deliveries of projects, launches and business development (addition of land parcels for future projects), he said. "Housing market as a whole is holding up. Lo For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Adequate safeguards for India in trade agreement with US: Goyal
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 New Delhi: Union Commerce and Industry Ministe
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 New Delhi: Union Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal speaks during an exclusive interview with PTI Editor-in-Chief Vijay Joshi, in New Delhi, Sunday, Feb. 8, 2026 Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal on Sunday said adequate safeguards are in place in the trade agreement with the US to protect the interests of farmers and the domestic industry from any significant increase in imports. The trade deal with the US will "ultimately help our farmers", who are already exporting $50-55 billion worth of agricultural and fish products, he said. The minister added that Indian goods will have a competitive advantage in the American market due to the 18 per cent tariff, as competitor nations such as China face tariffs as high as 35 per cent, while other countries are subject to levies of over 19 per cent. "This is a t For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

summaryParagraphs: मध्य प्रदेश के नीमच ज़िले में एक आंगनबाड़ी में बच्चों पर अचानक मधुमक्खियों ने हमला कर दिया. कंचन बाई अगर चाहतीं तो अपनी जान बचाने के लिए भाग जातीं लेकिन उन्होंने बच्चों की जान बचाने के लिए अपनी जान गंवा दी. items.headline: India negotiating new FTAs - The Economic Times
whyItMatters: India negotiating new FTAs The Economic Times ‘Tough job’: Piyush Goyal hails negotiators behind FTAs after India-US trade deal Times of India India US trade deal: India today negotiating trade deals

items.headline: Elon Musk denies Starlink phone: CEO says no device in works
whyItMatters: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet busines
summaryParagraphs: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet business's expansion ahead of a potential IPO. Musk has previously expressed strong reluctance towards phone manufacturing. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.

items.headline: फ़ैशन डिज़ाइनर कैसे बन सकते हैं और इस प्रोफेशन में कितनी कमाई हो सकती है?
whyItMatters: भारत की टेक्सटाइल और अपैरल इंडस्ट्री करीब 4.5 करोड़ लोगों को रोज़गार देती है. इसे कृषि के बाद रोज़गार देने वाला देश का दूसरे सबसे बड़ा सेक्टर कहा जाता है. लेकिन इसमें करियर के कौन से मौके होते हैं और
summaryParagraphs: भारत की टेक्सटाइल और अपैरल इंडस्ट्री करीब 4.5 करोड़ लोगों को रोज़गार देती है. इसे कृषि के बाद रोज़गार देने वाला देश का दूसरे सबसे बड़ा सेक्टर कहा जाता है. लेकिन इसमें करियर के कौन से मौके होते हैं और इस पेशे में कमाई कितनी होती है?
